root_causes.description: Form reset/close executed before photo/location/refresh — early returns skipped all persistence
root_causes.fix: Move form reset to end of handleAddModel, eliminate early returns from photo block

root_causes.description: uploadModelPhoto double-checked consent with DB round-trip that could race with just-inserted audit row
root_causes.fix: Added skipConsentCheck option, used in handleAddModel batch uploads

root_causes.description: Location write came after photo block — any photo failure skipped location
Mirror sync used only uploaded URLs, not full model_photos rebuild (broke merge case)
models prop in MyModelsTab IS already fullModels — no light-model degradation
Invite resend showed dead-end error when all tokens expired
root_causes.fix: Auto-regenerate token via generateModelClaimToken before resending

root_causes.description: Silent failure when all uploads returned null — no user feedback
root_causes.fix: Explicit alert when zero uploads succeed despite files present

root_causes.description: handleSaveModel called onRefresh() without await — completeness checks ran on stale data
